item.title: Current Mortgage Rates: February 16 to February 20, 2026
item.description: Mortgage rates are trending lower, although they remain slightly above 6%. Rates are expected to remain in their current range for the time being.

item.title: Gold Prices Today: February 18, 2026
item.description: Today’s gold prices see the precious metal move up from yesterday. Here are today’s gold futures prices and a quick snapshot of where gold was yesterd...

item.title: Social Security Trust Fund to Run Out of Money in 2032, a Year Sooner Than Expected
item.description: If Social Security’s trust funds were fully depleted, the result would be a roughly 20% across-the-board cut in benefits.

item.title: What Your Checking Account Is Telling You (That You May Be Ignoring)
item.description: Check for a lack of a cash buffer, unnecessary fees and more.

item.title: ‘I Can’t Believe How Upset This Made Me’: I Earned $175K, and My Social Security Tax Stopped. Why Don’t High Earners Pay More?
item.description: The payroll tax cap exists, in part, because Social Security benefits only go up to a certain level.
